svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="研发做产品的六个错" id="six-mistakes"> <mxGraphModel dx="-519" dy="-160" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="560" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="TITLE" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;fontColor=#1e293b;" value="研发做产品,稳定地掉进这 6 个坑" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="420" x="280" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ROOT" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="共同的根子:
把产品当技术题,但产品是判断题" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="220" x="380" y="470" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="错一 把功能当价值
「我做完了」≠「有人用」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="250" x="40" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="错二 没有整体观
只看自己这摊,接缝处漏水" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="250" x="370" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="错三 对商业模式不敏感
做了一堆「正确但没用」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="250" x="700" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="错四 只接需求字面意思
最普遍的浪费" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="250" x="40" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="错五 从自身出发开发
研发是最不像用户的人" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="250" x="370" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="M6" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="错六 不验证假设
没埋点 = 没上线" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="250" x="700" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F1" edge="1" parent="1" source="M1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="ROOT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F2" edge="1" parent="1" source="M2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="ROOT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F3" edge="1" parent="1" source="M3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="ROOT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F4" edge="1" parent="1" source="M4" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="ROOT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F5" edge="1" parent="1" source="M5" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="ROOT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="F6" edge="1" parent="1" source="M6" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;html=1;endArrow=classic;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;" target="ROOT"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.div: 研发做产品,稳定地掉进这 6 个坑

div.div:

把产品当技术题,但产品是判断题
